hero.title: Hotels That Welcome Your Pet
hero.subtitle: Find the perfect stay for you and your dog. Browse by destination, filter by pet policy, book directly on Booking.com.

howItWorks.title: Book in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our curated list of pet-friendly destinations across Europe.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Filter hotels by pet policy, size limits, and amenities.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Click through to Booking.com and complete your reservation.

footer.disclosureText: This site contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission when you book through our links, at no extra cost to you.

destinations.title: All Pet-Friendly Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Browse every city in our guide — from Amsterdam to Lisbon, discover where to stay with your pet.

categories.title: All Pet Categories
categories.subtitle: From dog-friendly to luxury pet stays — find exactly what your pet needs.

combo.ctaDesc: Find even more options on Booking.com — filter by pet policy, price, and amenities.
combo.noHotels: No hotels listed yet for this combination. Check back soon or browse Booking.com directly.
